title: [Goal] Devtools: refactor from plugin to core command menu
description:
## Description

Refactor devtools from a plugin (gated by plugins.devtools config) into a core feature. Replace the floating beaker/lab-glass trigger button with a ⌘ character trigger that opens a command menu (command palette pattern). The trigger becomes a command-trigger, the menu becomes a command-menu.

Key changes:
- Remove plugin gating — devtools is always-on core infrastructure
- Replace beaker SVG icon with ⌘ character on the trigger button
- Rename trigger class from sb-devtools-trigger to sb-command-trigger
- Rename menu from sb-devtools-menu to sb-command-menu
- Unify with the declarative tool registry (modes.config.json) — the command menu should render items from getToolsForMode() instead of hardcoding menu items
- Remove isPluginEnabled(devtools) gate from mountDevTools
- Remove plugins.devtools from storyboard.config.json
- Consider migrating devtools.js to Svelte (using shadcn Command component)

Reference:
- Current implementation: packages/core/src/devtools.js (~500 lines vanilla JS)
- Tool registry: packages/core/src/modes.js (initTools, setToolAction, getToolsForMode)
- Config: modes.config.json (declares viewfinder, scene-info, reset-params, hide-mode, feature-flags as dev tools)
- Currently two parallel systems: floating devtools toolbar (hardcoded) vs declarative tool registry (unused). This refactor unifies them.

## Tasks

- [x] **#g002#t01**: Remove plugin gating from devtools
  Remove isPluginEnabled(devtools) check from mountDevTools(). Remove plugins.devtools from storyboard.config.json. Devtools becomes always-on core infrastructure.
- [x] **#g002#t02**: Replace beaker icon with ⌘ character
  Replace BEAKER_ICON SVG constant with a ⌘ text character on the trigger button. Update class from sb-devtools-trigger to sb-command-trigger.
- [x] **#g002#t03**: Rename devtools UI to command menu
  Rename sb-devtools-menu to sb-command-menu, sb-devtools-wrapper to sb-command-wrapper. Update all CSS classes and DOM references.
- [x] **#g002#t04**: Wire command menu to tool registry
  Replace hardcoded menu items in devtools.js with items from getToolsForMode(). Each tool in modes.config.json becomes a command menu item. setToolAction() provides the click handler.
- [x] **#g002#t05**: Migrate command menu to Svelte + shadcn
  Replace vanilla JS DOM construction with a Svelte CommandMenu.svelte component using shadcn Command component. Mount via mountSveltePlugin().
- [x] **#g002#t06**: Remove plugins system if no longer needed
  If devtools was the only plugin consumer, evaluate removing initPlugins/isPluginEnabled/getPluginsConfig from core exports. Check if any other plugins exist.
- [x] **#g002#t07**: Update exports and tests
  Update packages/core/src/index.js exports (mountDevTools → mountCommandMenu or similar). Update devtools.test.js. Verify build, lint, all tests pass.

---
_Managed by clips • Goal ID: #g002_

title: **#g002#t03**: Rename devtools UI to command menu
**#g002#t04**: Wire command menu to tool registry
**#g002#t05**: Migrate command menu to Svelte + shadcn
**#g002#t06**: Remove plugins system if no longer needed
